title: [TACZ] Resource Gathering
description: A mod which helps the player gather resources faster for the TACZ gun mod
body:
![Support Me!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dafbdf7ba3d386e29601504513736ed76fec9aa_0.webp)

[My Partnership Link](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1139)


A simple mod that adds four ores to the overworld to help with gathering resources for TACZ guns

The four ores are:

-Quartz (When mined, gives nether quartz)

-Sulfur (When mined gives sulfur dust)

-Magnesium (When mined gives blaze powder)

-Silicon Carbide (When mined gives silicon carbide)

Sulfur is used with charcoal to make gunpowder on a crafting table. Charcoal can also be made by placing any type of wood log on a campfire.

Silicon Carbide, when smelted in a blast furnace, turns into netherite scrap

Blaze powder can be combined on a crafting table into blaze rods.

 

Want just the sulfur and campfire recipes? 

Simple Gunpowder and Charcoal Recipes - Minecraft Mods - CurseForge

This mod was created for this modpack: 
[Apocalypse Remnants of Earth](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/apocalypse-remnants-of-earth)

Feel free to use in free modpacks

 

Need help/found a bug? Join the Discord!
